content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6-max

## Summary

Thorough review of bead ralph-burning-rlm.3 implementation. The attempt-binding infrastructure (run_id/run_started_at in RunPidRecord, RunningAttemptIdentity, pid_record_matches_attempt, observed_stale_running_owner_still_matches_attempt) was established in the parent rlm bead. The rlm.3 commit (5517524e) added the critical stop_target_pid_record_is_unchanged revalidation before SIGTERM delivery in handle_stop's CliProcess branch, plus a dedicated test. Combined, these prevent: (1) run stop from killing a freshly-resumed orchestrator via PID record + attempt revalidation, (2) run resume from reclaiming a fresh writer lease via attempt-bound staleness checks, (3) reconcile_or_recover_claimed_running_snapshot detecting AttemptChanged when the snapshot moved between lock acquisition and recovery. All acceptance criteria verified: run.pid includes run_id/run_started_at, run stop aborts on PID handoff, run resume aborts lease reclaim on owner change, race condition tests exist, cargo test (788 passed), cargo clippy -D warnings clean, cargo fmt --check clean, nix build succeeds.

## Amendments

None.
